record_types.name: gsl_spline

subprograms.name: alloc
subprograms.code:
function alloc
  (T : access constant gsl.interp.gsl_interp_type; size : size_t)
   return access gsl_spline

subprograms.code:
function eval
  (spline : access constant gsl_spline; x : double;
